title: Historical Post-060 Next Active Olares Lane Selection Decision
historical_note: This record preserves one earlier Dev Residency decision slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform on 2026-05-07. It is historical provenance, not a live next-lane selector for current repo operations.

objective: Select the next truthful active Olares-first lane after the deferred Operations Visibility hold branch and the separate simultaneous-worker branch are both parked on published dormancy rules.
dependency_note: Packet 060 parks the deferred Operations Visibility hold branch, Packet 095 parks the simultaneous-worker branch, and the developer-host cutover milestones plus current Olares-first priority leave one truthful next question: which active Olares-first lane should open now that those branches are closed by rule rather than by unfinished work.
verdict_summary: The next active Olares-first lane is a planning-only host-resident developer-workflow hardening follow-on. The durable host mirror, minimal MCP trio plus apex-jobs operating model, and client-only laptop posture are already proven; the remaining Olares-first value is to identify concrete host-resident development friction and select one smallest hardening slice rather than reopening dormant branches or widening infrastructure by assumption.
selected_next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 062 - Host-Resident Developer Workflow Hardening Planning
selected_next_packet_scope: Consume the current durable-host, client-only-laptop, and minimal-MCP-trio authority surfaces.
Inventory concrete host-resident workflow friction that still increases prompt relay, operator overhead, or recovery risk.
Classify each friction item as docs-only, task/operator-surface, or bounded tooling/bootstrap follow-on.
Select exactly one smallest hardening slice without reopening dormant branches or widening trust boundaries.
rejected_as_next_active_lane: Reopen the deferred Operations Visibility hold branch without live-data change or a concrete host-query requirement.
Reopen simultaneous-worker planning or execution without new evidence satisfying the published trigger framework.
Open broader AI-services expansion, ai_tasks bridge widening, Gitea transition, or canonical-hosting transition by assumption.
Default back into generic Operations Visibility feature delivery solely because previous consumer slices are complete.
sql_permission_note: This decision packet authorizes no source/test execution, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no runtime or service mutation, no AI-services expansion, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-06 as the continuation decision after both active bounded Olares follow-ons were parked on published dormancy rules. Packet 061 selects one new active lane only: planning the next host-resident developer-workflow hardening slice.
